author: @roidroid
text:
Because of how you pronounce EcoFoam Robert, it may be a good idea to also register the term ECHOfoam as a trademark.  Otherwise someone could pretend to be you.

(b4 anyone else tells me Rob doesn't like patents, trademarks arn't patents)

author: @BioDynamicIndustries
text: Coconut oil & lye work beautifully to cut grease and carbon.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: that's cool and I understand why it would work so well but a lot of people don't like to work with lye - it's fairly caustic stuff - it's also the main component of standard oven cleaners
